How to use:
  1. Open Firefox and log into wiki.cerner.com / community.oracle.com.
  2. Click a category card below to open its subpage.
  3. On the subpage: right-click → DownThemAll! → Links tab → set folder to C:\Users\briankehoe\Documents\Work\Python\CernerScraper\Development\CernerScraper\DownloadedFiles → Start.
  4. Use Queue Ignore or Queue Restore on the subpage if you want the next run to move a link into or out of the ignored sections.
  5. Move downloaded files into C:\Users\briankehoe\Documents\Work\Python\CernerScraper\Development\CernerScraper\DownloadedFiles and re-run the scraper.
Ignore workflow: category pages now include Queue Ignore and Queue Restore buttons. Because this report is static HTML, those buttons build PowerShell commands for you to copy or download and run against C:\Users\briankehoe\Documents\Work\Python\CernerScraper\Development\CernerScraper\Outputs\Tools\manage_missing_links.py.
